global.title: The Powerhouse CLI (ph-cmd) provides all essential commands for project lifecycle management
global.content:
The Powerhouse CLI (`ph-cmd`) is the primary tool for managing Powerhouse projects. Key commands:

- `ph init` - Initialize a new project (scaffolds directory structure from boilerplate)
- `ph vetra --watch` - Launch Vetra Studio with live code generation (recommended)
- `ph vetra --interactive` - Launch with confirmation prompts before generation
- `ph connect` - Run Connect application locally (legacy)
- `ph generate <file.phd>` - Manually generate code from exported specification
- `ph generate --editor <name> --document-types <type>` - Generate editor template
- `ph generate --drive-editor <name>` - Generate custom drive interface
- `ph reactor` / `ph switchboard` - Start the API service
- `ph install <package>` - Install a published Powerhouse package
- `ph use <env>` - Switch dependency environments (latest/dev/prod/local)
- `ph update` - Update dependencies to latest versions

The CLI supports three release channels: latest (stable), dev, and staging.
global.description: Install globally via `pnpm install -g ph-cmd`. Key commands: ph init, ph vetra, ph connect, ph generate, ph reactor.
